Package Summary

Version 0.10.0
License Apache License 2.0
Build type AMENT_CMAKE
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/ros2/ament_cmake_ros.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version humble
Last Updated 2022-01-13
Dev Status MAINTAINED
Released RELEASED
Contributing Help Wanted (-)
Good First Issues (-)
Pull Requests to Review (-)

Package Description

The ROS specific CMake bits in the ament buildsystem.

Maintainers

  • Michel Hidalgo

Authors

  • Dirk Thomas
README
No README found. No README in repository either.
CHANGELOG

Changelog for package ament_cmake_ros

0.10.0 (2022-01-13)

  • Refactor domain_coordinator API to use a context manager (#12)
  • Contributors: Timo Röhling

0.9.2 (2021-05-12)

0.9.1 (2021-01-25)

  • Update package maintainers. (#11)
  • Contributors: Michel Hidalgo

0.9.0 (2020-04-17)

0.8.0 (2019-09-24)

  • 0.8.0
  • Add isolated gmock test (#4)
  • Contributors: Michael Carroll, Peter Baughman

0.7.0 (2019-04-11)

0.5.0 (2018-06-18)

0.4.0 (2017-12-08)

  • Add definition of ROS_PACKAGE_NAME (#2)
  • 0.0.3
  • 0.0.2
  • Export ament_cmake
  • add ament_cmake_ros providing the option BUILD_SHARED_LIBS defaulting to ON
  • Contributors: Dirk Thomas, Esteve Fernandez, dhood

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
ament_cmake
ament_cmake_gtest
ament_cmake_gmock
ament_cmake_pytest
ament_lint_auto
ament_lint_common
domain_coordinator

No direct system dependencies.

  • Add ament_add_ros_isolated_{gmock,gtest}_test macros (#29)

  • Contributors: Scott K Logan

0.14.1 (2025-04-02)

Package Description

The ROS specific CMake bits in the ament buildsystem.

Maintainers

  • Brandon Ong

Authors

  • Dirk Thomas
  • Michel Hidalgo
README
No README found. No README in repository either.
CHANGELOG

Changelog for package ament_cmake_ros

0.15.6 (2025-12-09)

0.15.5 (2025-11-28)

0.15.4 (2025-10-31)

0.15.3 (2025-10-17)

0.15.2 (2025-07-29)

  • fix cmake deprecation (#47)
  • Contributors: mosfet80

0.15.1 (2025-06-30)

0.15.0 (2025-04-24)

0.14.3 (2025-04-18)

0.14.2 (2025-04-18)

  • Add ament_add_ros_isolated_{gmock,gtest}_test macros (#29)
  • Switch from 'domain_coordinator' to 'rmw_test_fixture' (#28)
  • Add ament_add_ros_isolated_test function (#27)
  • Contributors: Scott K Logan

0.14.1 (2025-04-02)

0.14.0 (2025-03-19)

  • Split generic parts of ament_cmake_ros into _core package (#20)
  • Contributors: Scott K Logan

0.13.1 (2024-11-20)

0.13.0 (2024-04-26)

0.12.0 (2023-04-27)

0.11.2 (2023-02-13)

  • [rolling] Update maintainers - 2022-11-07 (#16)
  • Contributors: Audrow Nash

0.11.1 (2022-09-13)

  • Update maintainers (#15)
  • Contributors: methylDragon

0.11.0 (2022-04-29)

0.10.0 (2022-01-13)

  • Refactor domain_coordinator API to use a context manager (#12)
  • Contributors: Timo Röhling

0.9.2 (2021-05-12)

0.9.1 (2021-01-25)

  • Update package maintainers. (#11)
  • Contributors: Michel Hidalgo

0.9.0 (2020-04-17)

0.8.0 (2019-09-24)

  • 0.8.0
  • Add isolated gmock test (#4)
  • Contributors: Michael Carroll, Peter Baughman

0.7.0 (2019-04-11)

0.5.0 (2018-06-18)

0.4.0 (2017-12-08)

  • Add definition of ROS_PACKAGE_NAME (#2)
  • 0.0.3
  • 0.0.2
  • Export ament_cmake
  • add ament_cmake_ros providing the option BUILD_SHARED_LIBS defaulting to ON
  • Contributors: Dirk Thomas, Esteve Fernandez, dhood

Package Description

The ROS specific CMake bits in the ament buildsystem.

Maintainers

  • Michel Hidalgo

Authors

  • Dirk Thomas
README
No README found. No README in repository either.
CHANGELOG

Changelog for package ament_cmake_ros

0.9.2 (2021-05-12)

0.9.1 (2021-01-25)

  • Update package maintainers. (#11)
  • Contributors: Michel Hidalgo

0.9.0 (2020-04-17)

0.8.0 (2019-09-24)

  • 0.8.0
  • Add isolated gmock test (#4)
  • Contributors: Michael Carroll, Peter Baughman

0.7.0 (2019-04-11)

0.5.0 (2018-06-18)

0.4.0 (2017-12-08)

  • Add definition of ROS_PACKAGE_NAME (#2)
  • 0.0.3
  • 0.0.2
  • Export ament_cmake
  • add ament_cmake_ros providing the option BUILD_SHARED_LIBS defaulting to ON
  • Contributors: Dirk Thomas, Esteve Fernandez, dhood

CHANGELOG

Changelog for package ament_cmake_ros

0.11.2 (2023-02-13)

  • [rolling] Update maintainers - 2022-11-07 (#16)

0.11.1 (2022-09-13)

  • Update maintainers (#15)
  • Contributors: methylDragon

0.11.0 (2022-04-29)

0.10.0 (2022-01-13)

  • Refactor domain_coordinator API to use a context manager (#12)

0.9.2 (2021-05-12)

0.9.1 (2021-01-25)

  • Update package maintainers. (#11)

Package Summary

Version 0.10.0
License Apache License 2.0
Build type AMENT_CMAKE
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/ros2/ament_cmake_ros.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version humble
Last Updated 2022-01-13
Dev Status MAINTAINED
Released RELEASED
Contributing Help Wanted (-)
Good First Issues (-)
Pull Requests to Review (-)

Package Description

The ROS specific CMake bits in the ament buildsystem.

Maintainers

  • Michel Hidalgo

Authors

  • Dirk Thomas
README
No README found. No README in repository either.
CHANGELOG

Changelog for package ament_cmake_ros

0.10.0 (2022-01-13)

  • Refactor domain_coordinator API to use a context manager (#12)
  • Contributors: Timo Röhling

0.9.2 (2021-05-12)

0.9.1 (2021-01-25)

  • Update package maintainers. (#11)
  • Contributors: Michel Hidalgo

0.9.0 (2020-04-17)

0.8.0 (2019-09-24)

  • 0.8.0
  • Add isolated gmock test (#4)
  • Contributors: Michael Carroll, Peter Baughman

0.7.0 (2019-04-11)

0.5.0 (2018-06-18)

0.4.0 (2017-12-08)

  • Add definition of ROS_PACKAGE_NAME (#2)
  • 0.0.3
  • 0.0.2
  • Export ament_cmake
  • add ament_cmake_ros providing the option BUILD_SHARED_LIBS defaulting to ON
  • Contributors: Dirk Thomas, Esteve Fernandez, dhood

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
ament_cmake
ament_cmake_gtest
ament_cmake_gmock
ament_cmake_pytest
ament_lint_auto
ament_lint_common
domain_coordinator

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Package Summary

Version 0.10.0
License Apache License 2.0
Build type AMENT_CMAKE
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/ros2/ament_cmake_ros.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version humble
Last Updated 2022-01-13
Dev Status MAINTAINED
Released RELEASED
Contributing Help Wanted (-)
Good First Issues (-)
Pull Requests to Review (-)

Package Description

The ROS specific CMake bits in the ament buildsystem.

Maintainers

  • Michel Hidalgo

Authors

  • Dirk Thomas
README
No README found. No README in repository either.
CHANGELOG

Changelog for package ament_cmake_ros

0.10.0 (2022-01-13)

  • Refactor domain_coordinator API to use a context manager (#12)
  • Contributors: Timo Röhling

0.9.2 (2021-05-12)

0.9.1 (2021-01-25)

  • Update package maintainers. (#11)
  • Contributors: Michel Hidalgo

0.9.0 (2020-04-17)

0.8.0 (2019-09-24)

  • 0.8.0
  • Add isolated gmock test (#4)
  • Contributors: Michael Carroll, Peter Baughman

0.7.0 (2019-04-11)

0.5.0 (2018-06-18)

0.4.0 (2017-12-08)

  • Add definition of ROS_PACKAGE_NAME (#2)
  • 0.0.3
  • 0.0.2
  • Export ament_cmake
  • add ament_cmake_ros providing the option BUILD_SHARED_LIBS defaulting to ON
  • Contributors: Dirk Thomas, Esteve Fernandez, dhood

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
ament_cmake
ament_cmake_gtest
ament_cmake_gmock
ament_cmake_pytest
ament_lint_auto
ament_lint_common
domain_coordinator

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.
